name: Espresso
description: Double shot of our seasonal espresso blend — rich and syrupy with a hazelnut finish

name: Americano
description: Two shots pulled long over hot water. Clean and direct — lets the bean speak

name: Flat White
description: Double ristretto with a thin layer of velvety microfoam. Less milk more coffee

name: Cortado
description: Equal parts espresso and warm milk. Sharp and balanced — nothing hidden

name: Cappuccino
description: Classic thirds: espresso

name: Latte
description: Double shot with steamed whole milk and a whisper of foam. Oat milk available

name: Single Origin Pour Over
description: One farm one cup. Ask the bar what's on today — it changes with the harvest

name: Filter Coffee
description: Batch brew changed every two hours. A reliable cup from a rotating single origin

name: Matcha Latte
description: Ceremonial grade matcha whisked smooth with steamed oat milk. Earthy and slightly sweet

name: Hot Chocolate
description: 70% dark couverture melted into steamed milk. Not too sweet — grown-up chocolate

name: Cold Brew
description: Steeped for 18 hours in cold water. Low acidity high sweetness served over ice

name: Nitro Cold Brew
description: Cold brew on tap with a nitrogen charge. Creamy cascade no ice needed

description: Ristretto over ice with a small pour of cold oat milk. Punchy but smooth

description: Cold brew poured over ice and Fever-Tree tonic. Unexpected and addictive

description: Matcha shaken with oat milk and a touch of honey over ice

name: Still Water
description: Filtered in-house — served chilled

name: Sparkling Water
description: San Pellegrino 250ml

name: Butter Croissant
description: Laminated in-house and baked fresh each morning. Best before 11am

description: Day-old croissant re-baked with frangipane and flaked almonds. Crisp outside soft inside

description: House granola with toasted oats coconut and pecans served with Greek yoghurt and seasonal fruit

description: Thick chewy centre crispy edge 70% chocolate from Valrhona. Made daily
